title: Numa Rar

{{Quote|I do not ask for rescue, only for help in my struggle.|Numa Rar|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''</ref>}}
'''Numa Rar''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] and the sister of [[Alema Rar]].

==Biography==
===Early life===
Numa Rar grew up as an impoverished [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], and along with her sister, [[Alema Rar|Alema]] worked as a dancer to survive. [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Numa and Alema Rar were eventually discovered by passing Jedi Knight [[Daeshara'cor]], who took the two young Twi'lek women under her tutelage, and later traveled with them to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], where Rar was trained at the [[Jedi Praxeum]].

===Yuuzhan Vong War===
In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], when the extragalactic [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invaded]] [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the [[New Jedi Order]] was mobilized to engage the threat. Several months into the war, Daeshara'cor was [[Death/Legends|struck down]] at the [[Battle of Ithor]]. Numa Rar wished to honor the memory of her fallen protector by continuing in what she saw as a noble battle, but her actions came under the scrutiny of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], especially once the Rar sisters became partisan leaders on [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] occupied by the invaders. Conducting an aggressive campaign against the Yuuzhan Vong present on the planet, Rar isolated herself and her sister from the New Jedi Order as the invasion wore on. She nevertheless tried to enlist aid from those who were willing to help, receiving supplies from the maverick [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Kyp Durron]], and later traveling to [[Shelter]], a Jedi base in [[Maw Cluster/Legends|The Maw]], in a futile attempt to gain funds and war matériel.

Eventually, the success of Numa and Alema Rar's [[New Plympto resistance (Yuuzhan Vong War)|resistance]] movement encouraged the Yuuzhan Vong to wipe out all life on the planet, forcing the native [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurians]] and thousands of [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] off the planet. Rar and her sister hid among a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of intrasystem [[ore miners]], along with many others fleeing New Plympto's devastation. Rescued by the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Nebula Chaser]]'', and promised safe asylum by its [[Captain/Legends|captain]], [[Pollux]], Numa Rar and her sister planned to return to the New Jedi Order. In an uncharted [[Star system/Legends|star system]], however, the ''Nebula Chaser'' was intercepted by a Yuuzhan Vong [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]], and boarded by a search party, who demanded to know if Jedi were present aboard the [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. Pollux lied to protect the Rar sisters, but the presence of a Jedi-hunting [[voxyn]] among the search party brought an end to the charade. Unable to conceal her presence in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], Numa Rar led her sister in a doomed attempt to flee the creature, which doggedly tracked them through the cruiser. Confronted in the [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] launch bay by the voxyn, Numa Rar was hit in the face by a blast of potent acid, which burned into her skull and killed her. Rar died in her sister's arms.

===Legacy===
Numa's death was a source of permanent grief and anger to Alema, whose fall to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] was a long and drawn out process. When Alema was trapped on [[Tenupe]] between [[36 ABY]] and [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], she had hallucinations that she and Numa were on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], exploring the jungles. In [[44 ABY]], [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] glimpsed Rar in the [[Lake of Apparitions]] while seeking his deceased wife [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], but did not stop to talk with her.<ref name="Apocalypse">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Apocalypse]]''</ref>
